algorithms.label: BBox Humanoid Baseline
algorithms.description: Disabled: old geometric baseline is misleading for this model and must not be used for recommendations or production decisions.

algorithms.label: Mesh Profile
algorithms.description: Disabled: mesh-profile scoring created false confidence and must not be used.

algorithms.label: Q Bird Profile
algorithms.description: Disabled: template rules alone are not reliable enough for Skin handoff.

algorithms.label: Semantic Q Bird
algorithms.description: Disabled: old semantic estimate still depends on brittle profile scoring.

algorithms.label: Visual Semantic Q Bird
algorithms.description: Disabled: point-cloud target scoring can pass while arm/head/root semantics remain wrong.

algorithms.label: Tutorial Visual Q Bird
algorithms.description: Disabled: surface-targeted visual pass is not a Skin-ready semantic solution.

algorithms.label: Visual Candidate Generator
algorithms.description: Only allowed candidate generator. Its numeric scores are diagnostic-only; Skin handoff is decided solely by visual semantic blockers and human signoff.
